response.overview: This film is my exploration in the idea of touching my own art. As a video artist, I find in modern times I have been stripped of the opportunity of actually touching my own art with my own hands. With this film, I play with 8mm and 16mm film, direct animation and video synthesis in an attempt to actually put my finger print in my product. Even the sound consists of drawings I put through a 16mm film projector. As an artist in times where AI controls a lot of the decisions we are made to have, I want to go back to the basics and make something “real”.
response.tagline: “i’ve touched this with my hands”  i've touched this with my soul.
response.title: Touch.mov
